summary: Iteration 249 - Trial Modal Fix & Sovereign Trial Analytics Testing Complete. Backend: 12/12 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Trial graduation modal once-per-profile lock verified - modal shows on first login with expired trial, sets sovereign_trial_complete='true' in localStorage on dismiss, and does NOT reappear after page reload. Sovereign Dashboard Controls tab shows Trial Conversion analytics card with views/dismissals/upgrades and Reset Trial button. SmartDock dock_orientation and dock_snapped persistence to localStorage verified.
critical_code_review_comments: TrialGraduation.js line 13: SOVEREIGN_TRIAL_KEY = 'sovereign_trial_complete' - permanent once-per-profile flag
TrialGraduation.js line 71: Checks localStorage.getItem(SOVEREIGN_TRIAL_KEY) === 'true' before showing modal
TrialGraduation.js line 96: Sets localStorage.setItem(SOVEREIGN_TRIAL_KEY, 'true') on dismiss
TrialGraduation.js line 85: Tracks 'view' event via POST /api/treasury/trial-event
TrialGraduation.js line 100: Tracks 'dismiss' event via POST /api/treasury/trial-event
TrialGraduation.js line 105: Tracks 'upgrade_click' event via POST /api/treasury/trial-event
SmartDock.js line 61-66: Reads dock_orientation and dock_snapped from localStorage on mount
SmartDock.js line 190: Persists dock_orientation and dock_snapped to localStorage after drag
SovereignDashboard.js line 287-332: Trial Conversion analytics card with views, dismissals, upgrades, conversion_rate
SovereignDashboard.js line 307-320: Reset Trial button with confirmation dialog
treasury.py line 381-395: POST /api/treasury/trial-event tracks view/dismiss/upgrade_click events
treasury.py line 398-414: GET /api/treasury/sovereign/trial-analytics returns conversion metrics
treasury.py line 417-427: POST /api/treasury/sovereign/reset-trial clears all trial events
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user with expired trial
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 249 verified: (1) Trial modal once-per-profile lock working - sovereign_trial_complete localStorage flag prevents modal from reappearing after dismiss. (2) Trial analytics endpoints working: POST /api/treasury/trial-event tracks view/dismiss/upgrade_click, GET /api/treasury/sovereign/trial-analytics returns metrics, POST /api/treasury/sovereign/reset-trial clears events. (3) Sovereign Dashboard Controls tab shows Trial Conversion card with Views/Dismissed/Upgrades stats and Reset Trial button. (4) SmartDock persists dock_orientation and dock_snapped to localStorage after drag. (5) Orbital Mixer Playground mode working with class picker visible.

backend_trial_analytics.details: GET /api/treasury/sovereign/trial-analytics returns total_views, total_dismissals, total_upgrade_clicks, conversion_rate, dismiss_rate

backend_reset_trial.details: POST /api/treasury/sovereign/reset-trial clears all trial events and returns events_cleared count

backend_sovereign_config_get.details: GET /api/treasury/sovereign/config returns fee_percent, is_live, mirror_active, frozen_transactions

backend_skeleton_export.details: GET /api/treasury/skeleton/export returns framework skeleton with module_types, affinity_tags, tier_levels, class_archetypes

frontend_trial_modal_shows.details: Trial graduation modal appears for user with expired trial when sovereign_trial_complete not set

frontend_trial_modal_dismiss_sets_flag.details: Dismissing modal sets localStorage sovereign_trial_complete='true' and trial_graduation_dismissed='true'

frontend_trial_modal_once_per_profile.details: Modal does NOT reappear after page reload when sovereign_trial_complete='true' in localStorage

frontend_sovereign_dashboard_trial_analy.details: Controls tab shows Trial Conversion card with Views (5), Dismissed (1), Upgrades (0), 0% conversion

frontend_sovereign_dashboard_reset_trial.details: Reset Trial for All Users button present in Controls tab

frontend_smartdock_orientation_persisten.details: After dragging dock to right edge, localStorage dock_orientation='vertical' and dock_snapped='right'

frontend_smartdock_data_attributes.details: SmartDock has data-orientation and data-snapped attributes that update on drag

frontend_orbital_mixer_playground.details: Playground mode shows orbital ring with frequency modules and Choose Class button
